name: Iron Golem

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Fire, Poison, Psychic; Charmed, Exhaustion, Frightened, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned

traits.name: Languages
traits.text: Understands Common plus two other languages but can't speak

traits.name: Fire Absorption
traits.text: Whenever the golem is subjected to Fire damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Fire damage dealt.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.text: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

text:
# Iron Golem

*Large Construct, Unaligned*

A furnace-hearted colossus of iron, nearly indestructible and utterly obedient.

### Actions

**Bladed Arm.** Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 10 ft. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

**Fiery Bolt.** Ranged Attack Roll: +10, range 120 ft. Hit: 36 (8d8) Fire damage.

**Poison Breath (Recharge 6).** Constitution Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 55 (10d10) Poison damage. Success: Half damage.
